title: Delicate Smoky Argentinian Broad Beans Wrap
description: A peppery and comforting Argentinian dish featuring broad beans, served in a corn husk wrap with a smoky flavor, perfect for a vegetarian meal.
instructions: Soak the corn husks in water for 30 minutes to make them pliable.
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the broad beans, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 5 minutes until the beans are tender.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional minute.
Assemble the wraps by placing a quarter of the bean mixture onto the center of each corn husk.
Fold the sides of the husk over the filling and roll up the wrap to enclose.
Serve the wraps warm, garnished with additional smoked paprika if desired.
